domain: Andean khipu/quipu Inca knot-cord record-keeping (Quechua): primary top cord + K pendant cords + L subsidiary cords (secondary/tertiary/quaternary); 3 knot types figure-8=1 + long-knot=2-9 + single-knot=10ⁿ position-encoded; decimal-hierarchy 1s farthest 10s next 100s 1000s; subsidiaries = corrections/exceptions/subsets; cord ply+length+end-treatment+color+spacing carries meaning
specific_mechanism: KHIPU-PRIMARY-PENDANT-SUBSIDIARY-CASCADE-DECIMAL: 4-tier hierarchical token-routing cascade with (1) 4-tier hierarchy: primary backbone P_top → pendant LLM_pendant (K-class router) → secondary LLM_sec (subset routing) → tertiary LLM_tert (correction/exception); each tier escalates only if confidence c_R < tier-specific τ_R; (2) 3-knot-type token-class encoding: request classified into K_types {atomic_figure-8, multi-step_long, exceptional_single} determining cascade depth; (3) decimal-position scaling factor: token position from primary scales model size by 10^k (1s=smallest tier-4 model, 10s=tier-3, 100s=tier-2, 1000s=tier-1 primary); (4) subsidiary correction loop: when downstream tier produces output, primary-tier verifies; on disagreement primary spawns tertiary 'correction subsidiary' that explicitly handles exception; (5) cord-attribute multi-dim metadata: each request carries ply (modality), length (max budget), end (output format), color (priority) attributes used by router. Differs from R505 KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW (multi-stage cistern context-buffer + wind-tower thermal-attention damping cool-reference cross-attention + vent-shaft per-stage diagnostic-readout layer-norm injection + sarooj impermeable buffer-boundary controlled-outlet, no 4-tier primary-pendant-subsidiary + no 3-knot-type encoding + no decimal-position model-scale + no subsidiary correction loop + no cord-attribute multi-dim metadata) by 4-tier khipu hierarchy + 3-knot-type classification + decimal-position model-scale 10^k + subsidiary correction loop + cord-attribute multi-dim metadata.
llm_application: KHIPU-PRIMARY-PENDANT-SUBSIDIARY-CASCADE-DECIMAL 4-tier hierarchical token-routing cascade with primary-pendant-secondary-tertiary escalation + 3-knot-type token-class classification atomic/multi-step/exceptional determining cascade depth + decimal-position scaling factor 10^k model-size + subsidiary correction loop primary-tier verify exception subsidiary spawn + cord-attribute multi-dim metadata ply-length-end-color. Differs from R413. R422. R429. R438. R455. R480. R493. R505 KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW (closest — cistern-buffer + wind-tower + vent-shaft + sarooj). Differs from Dynamic Routing 2603.04445 + Unified Routing-Cascading + Cascaded LM 2506.11887 + LLM Multi-Objective Cascade by 4-tier khipu + 3-knot-type + decimal-position + correction loop + cord-attribute metadata. Differs by 4-TIER KHIPU HIERARCHY + 3-KNOT-TYPE CLASSIFICATION + DECIMAL-POSITION 10^K MODEL SCALE + SUBSIDIARY CORRECTION LOOP + CORD-ATTRIBUTE MULTI-DIM METADATA.
novelty_claim: Dynamic Model Routing Cascading 2603.04445 + Unified Routing-Cascading OpenReview + Cascaded LM 2506.11887 + LLM Multi-Objective Cascade 2410.08014 cover LLM-cascade hierarchical-escalation space. KHIPU-PRIMARY-PENDANT-SUBSIDIARY-CASCADE-DECIMAL adds (a) 4-tier explicit primary-pendant-secondary-tertiary + (b) 3-knot-type token-class classification + (c) decimal-position 10^k model-size scaling + (d) subsidiary correction loop with exception spawn + (e) cord-attribute multi-dim metadata. Recombination — borderline lookup.
